After Trump's comment about "extraterrestrial things" and Fox News Healines for this article: "Trump admin releases first batch of declassified UFO files documenting 'extraterrestrial life'" [link removed] I think a resolution to 'Yes' is here based on consensus of credible reporting.  There are many other news agencies publishing the same.
Fact

The article does not say anything about that. it says "I will be directing the Secretary of War... to begin the process of identifying and releasing Government files related to alien and extraterrestrial life, unidentified aerial phenomena (UAP), and unidentified flying objects "That is, they wanted to release anything related to UFOs, aliens, etc, but until one is released that shows ET life, or that they definitively state it's  ET life there is no confirmation.

I think this should go to dispute. There have been several confirmations that are literally in line with what Trump said about extraterrestrial technology. If he mentions it, then he’s not denying it, therefore it counts as a confirmation. Otherwise, they wouldn’t even acknowledge or talk about it publicly. [link removed]

Plus we have the consensus of credible reporting that might report in on his direct confirmation.  Surely after using this phrasing today someone will ask him.

If Trump announces "We are not alone" and brings forth a live alien on stage, as long as he fails to explicitly specify the intelligence here as "extraterrestrial," the market still resolves to "No."

My fellow humans, a riddle for you... 

Q: What do UFOs leaving the Earth and this Polymarket bet have in common? 
A: UP ONLY!

We have the lowest bar to clear: extraterrestrial life or technology exists. That's it.  Not a live alien, just that technology exists that's not front this earth.

Now is the moment. The incentives for disclosure are aligning like never before. Chaos reigns, distractions are needed..

👽 They are here, they have always been here, billions of years before us and billions of years after we are gone. 🛸

Our perceptions of time and space are primitive compared to theirs, irrelevant. They have mastered things we cannot perceive. The Truth shall be set free, it is inevitable. It has already begun.
